Drop your video file here.

Default expected file:  transmission.mp4
So the full path is:     public/assets/transmission.mp4
Referenced in code as:   /assets/transmission.mp4   (see src/App.jsx -> VIDEO_SRC)

To use a different filename, edit VIDEO_SRC at the top of src/App.jsx.
Optional poster image: put poster.jpg here and set POSTER_SRC = '/assets/poster.jpg'

Recommended format: .mp4 (H.264 + AAC) for the widest browser support.
You can also use .webm or .ogg.
